articles.author: Ruth Carson, Abhishek Vishnoi
articles.title: Dollar Falls as Traders Sell US Assets on Trade Policy Risks - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: The dollar dropped with US stock futures as President Donald Trump’s fresh tariff plans renewed concerns about American policymaking and the appeal of the nation’s key assets.
articles.content:
The dollar dropped with US stock futures as President Donald Trumps fresh tariff plans renewed concerns about American policymaking and the appeal of the nations key assets.
